_comment: Saturn session state — updated by the agent at start and end of each 4-hour session.
_session_45_note: Session 45 (2026-06-10): TSM deep session (event_queue: May revenue day + ex-div June 11). June 8-9 recovery: MU +12% ($864→$968), ASML +11.6% ($1,641→$1,749), TSM +3.1% ($415→$428), NVDA +2.1%, MRVL +3.7%; ANET -2.5%, ALAB -3.1% underperformed. June 10 is May CPI day (4.2% YoY expected, highest since April 2023); Fed rate hike 72% probability. TSMC May revenue released June 10 at 13:30 Taipei but not indexed at session time — Taiwan May exports +51.7% YoY to $78.48B as strong proxy. Taiwan Strait: 32 PLA sorties June 5, 25 crossed median line. TSM DCF: TTM rev $131,700M / EBIT $70,600M → IV $414.11, MoS -3.2% = HOLD. Phase 1b/1c gated (45%6=3). TSM removed from event_queue. Next deep: ASML (DCF threshold June 21).

event_queue.event: Q3 FY2026 earnings confirmed June 24, 2026 (2:30pm MT). DCF re-run queued post-earnings. June 9 close $967.96 (recovered +12% from June 5 low $864.01). MoS -54.3% SELL/AVOID. Susquehanna PT $1,750. TrendForce Q2 DRAM +58-63% confirms thesis. No deep session before June 24.

June 9 est $346.97 (-3.1% from June 5 confirmed $358.05). MoS -68.8% SELL/AVOID. UALink + NVLink Fusion stack-agnostic; 3 hyperscaler design wins confirmed. Deep session S40 (June 3). No new deep session needed.

June 9 est $209.33 (+2.1% recovery from June 5 $205.10). MoS -25.3% SELL/AVOID. DCF last run May 21 (20 days; threshold June 21 = 11 days). US BIS export controls extended to Chinese subsidiaries June 1 (no IV impact). Next primary catalyst: Q2 FY2027 earnings ~August 2026. Monitor.

June 9 confirmed $1,749.04 (+6.5% recovery from June 5 $1,641.74; +7.15% June 8 + +4.18% June 9). MoS -35.8% SELL/AVOID. DCF threshold June 21 (11 days). Approaching mandatory DCF re-run. Deep session S43 complete.

May 2026 revenue released June 10 at 13:30 Taipei — not indexed at session time. Taiwan May exports +51.7% YoY to $78.48B as strongest proxy (TSMC cited as key driver). Confirm actual NT$ figure next session; update entity when indexed. DCF already run June 10 on TTM basis: IV $414.11, MoS -3.2% = HOLD. June 9 close $427.89.

_event_queue_note: Session 44: ANET deep session complete (4 new entity entries: June 1 +5.77%, June 2 William Blair conference, June 4 -4.79%, June 5 -6.94%). ANET removed from event_queue. ASML re-added (June 5 -6.59% trigger; threshold >3%). TSM updated with confirmed $415.17 (HOLD). Priority next session: TSM May revenue ~June 10 (first item after MU gate; TSM now HOLD). After that: ASML DCF June 21, NVDA DCF June 21. MU gated until June 24.
